meaning: n. 罗密欧,热恋的男子,<美>(男式)室内便鞋
examples: Romeo left the stage, to enthusiastic applause.
It was like a parody of the balcony scene from Romeo and Juliet.
One of the underlying themes of the entire movie is something everyone can relate to, and it's true in many stories like Romeo and Juliet.
Both Romeo and his brother-in-law worked in town's construction and footwear industries, Costamagna said.
Fiat saw sales fall 4%, but its Alfa Romeo brand saw sales collapse by a third.
